notes: Krkn is a CNCF sandbox chaos and resiliency testing tool for Kubernetes, originally built at Red Hat as "Kraken". The vowel-less spelling is pure branding: it is simply said "kraken", which the maintainers confirm in the README title "Krkn aka Kraken" and in the code (the entry point is still run_kraken.py). Dictionaries give KRAH-ken as the standard reading of kraken, with KRAY-ken and KRACK-en as common variants.
